intentSynonyms: start or resume playback in spotify
description: Start or resume playback. Provide context_uri for an album, playlist, or artist, or uris for specific tracks.

context_uri.description: Spotify URI of the context to play (album, playlist, or artist URI)

uris.description: Array of Spotify track URIs to play

offset.description: Zero-based position of the track to start playback from within the context

position_ms.description: Position in milliseconds to seek to within the track

device_id.description: Device ID to start playback on
